Package tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.actions

Class RemoveContainerAction

  • java.lang.Object
    • tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.AbstractDockerAction
      • tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.actions.RemoveContainerAction
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    IAdaptationAction
    public class RemoveContainerAction
extends AbstractDockerAction
    Adaptation action that removes a Docker container.

    This action removes a container from the Docker host. By default, it will only remove stopped containers. The force option can be used to remove running containers.

    Note: This action does NOT support rollback as removal is permanent.

    Author:
    Arléon Zemtsop (Cerberus)

      Constructor Description

      Constructs a new RemoveContainerAction with force option.

      Constructs a new RemoveContainerAction with all options.

      Constructs a new RemoveContainerAction with a custom Docker client.

    • Constructor Detail

      • RemoveContainerAction

        public RemoveContainerAction​(String containerId)
        Constructs a new RemoveContainerAction for the specified container.
        Parameters:
        containerId - the ID or name of the container to remove

      • RemoveContainerAction

        public RemoveContainerAction​(String containerId,
                             boolean force)
        Constructs a new RemoveContainerAction with force option.
        Parameters:
        containerId - the ID or name of the container to remove
        force - if true, force removal of running container

      • RemoveContainerAction

        public RemoveContainerAction​(String containerId,
                             boolean force,
                             boolean removeVolumes)
        Constructs a new RemoveContainerAction with options.
        Parameters:
        containerId - the ID or name of the container to remove
        force - if true, force removal of running container
        removeVolumes - if true, remove associated volumes

      • RemoveContainerAction

        public RemoveContainerAction​(String containerId,
                             boolean force,
                             boolean removeVolumes,
                             int timeoutSeconds)
        Constructs a new RemoveContainerAction with all options.
        Parameters:
        containerId - the ID or name of the container to remove
        force - if true, force removal of running container
        removeVolumes - if true, remove associated volumes
        timeoutSeconds - the timeout in seconds

      • RemoveContainerAction

        public RemoveContainerAction​(String containerId,
                             boolean force,
                             boolean removeVolumes,
                             int timeoutSeconds,
                             com.github.dockerjava.api.DockerClient dockerClient)
        Constructs a new RemoveContainerAction with a custom Docker client.
        Parameters:
        containerId - the ID or name of the container to remove
        force - if true, force removal of running container
        removeVolumes - if true, remove associated volumes
        timeoutSeconds - the timeout in seconds
        dockerClient - the Docker client to use

      • canPerform

        public boolean canPerform()
        Description copied from interface: IAdaptationAction
        Checks if this action can be performed given the current system state.
        Specified by:
        canPerform in interface IAdaptationAction
        Overrides:
        canPerform in class AbstractDockerAction
        Returns:
        true if the action can be performed, false otherwise

      • perform

        public AdaptationActionResult perform()
        Description copied from interface: IAdaptationAction
        Performs the adaptation action.

        This method contains the logic to execute the specific action defined by the implementing class.

        Returns:
        the result of the adaptation action execution

      • supportsRollback

        public boolean supportsRollback()
        Description copied from interface: IAdaptationAction
        Checks if this action supports rollback.
        Specified by:
        supportsRollback in interface IAdaptationAction
        Overrides:
        supportsRollback in class AbstractDockerAction
        Returns:
        true if rollback is supported, false otherwise

      • rollback

        public AdaptationActionResult rollback()
        Description copied from interface: IAdaptationAction
        Rolls back the adaptation action if possible.

        This method attempts to revert the changes made by the perform method. Not all actions support rollback.

        Specified by:
        rollback in interface IAdaptationAction
        Overrides:
        rollback in class AbstractDockerAction
        Returns:
        the result of the rollback operation

      • isForce

        public boolean isForce()
        Returns whether force removal is enabled.
        Returns:
        true if force removal is enabled

      • isRemoveVolumes

        public boolean isRemoveVolumes()
        Returns whether volume removal is enabled.
        Returns:
        true if volumes will be removed
